VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial
Focus: Cargo

The Greycat UTV is a durable, utility buggy designed to transport light cargo loads across rugged terrain. Whether you’re coordinating freight storage or making a supply run to a neighboring outpost, the straightforward design of the UTV allows operators to focus on tackling the job at hand.

English.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Greycat Industrial
Focus: Cargo

The Greycat UTV is a durable, utility buggy designed to transport light cargo loads across rugged terrain. Whether you’re coordinating freight storage or making a supply run to a neighboring outpost, the straightforward design of the UTV allows operators to focus on tackling the job at hand.

Localization.Name: Greycat Industrial
Localization.Description: A trusted manufacturer of industrial tools since 2337, the company’s extensive line of industrial equipment and armor make it one of the most respected brand names around. Greycat has remained a UEE staple for centuries thanks to their streamlined-yet-inventive designs, exacting safety standards, and a diverse product line.

Localization.Name: Roberts Space Industries
Localization.Description: The original creators of the engine that kickstarted Humanity’s expansion into space, Roberts Space Industries builds a wide range of spaceships that serve all needs, from basic interstellar travel to deep exploration on the outer edges of the galaxy. The tagline is “Roberts Space Industries: Delivering the Stars since 2075”

Localization.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
Localization.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

English.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
English.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

Localization.Name: Radix
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

Localization.Name: WillsOp
Localization.Description: WillsOp have products to cover the whole spectrum of electronic analysis from tracking and targeting to scanners and deep-space radar.

English.Name: WillsOp
English.Description: WillsOp have products to cover the whole spectrum of electronic analysis from tracking and targeting to scanners and deep-space radar.

Localization.Name: Denning
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.

English.Name: Denning
English.Description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 0
Grade: C

Localization.Name: J-Span
Localization.Description: J-Span does only one thing, but does it well. For over a century they have focused on producing quality coolers at a reasonable price. Half the time these days, when you pop the hull of a spacecraft, chances are you’re going to find a J-Span. Plus, their coolers can be found in more than just ships. They have a wide variety of sizes and shapes that can be found in everything from land transports, to computer systems, to refrigerator units. Appealing to the broader consumer market, their units might not have all the bells and whistles as some of the other manufacturer’s lines, but for the most part they avoid their quirks as well.

English.Name: J-Span
English.Description: J-Span does only one thing, but does it well. For over a century they have focused on producing quality coolers at a reasonable price. Half the time these days, when you pop the hull of a spacecraft, chances are you’re going to find a J-Span. Plus, their coolers can be found in more than just ships. They have a wide variety of sizes and shapes that can be found in everything from land transports, to computer systems, to refrigerator units. Appealing to the broader consumer market, their units might not have all the bells and whistles as some of the other manufacturer’s lines, but for the most part they avoid their quirks as well.

Localization.Name: Frost-Star SL
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: J-Span
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Whether cruising across the ground or sailing through space, there’s a J-Span cooler perfect for you. The Frost-Star SL is a mid-tier cooler designed to bring the line’s reliability to ground and open-canopy vehicles.

Localization.Name: Fuse
Localization.Description: This safety device provides protection to relays and other power systems from excessive current. Once tripped, fuses need to be replaced before normal operation can resume.
